def positive_test_wraps_sut_in_try_except_hiding_exception_detail():
    rule_id = "test_wraps_sut_in_try_except_hiding_exception_detail"
    family = "discipline"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Test wraps the system-under-test call in try/except, hiding the raised exception from pytest output."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
